finding: 11-node repro: Group>Circles>1st left copy{Circle 6 (factoryID=12 shape) + Clone B copy 21 (factoryID=15 clone) + <mask Image Mask factoryID=1>}. f10-f18 diverge ~6.1 dB uniformly: FCP masks the clone to the circle (a concentric RING); the ENGINE drops the GROUP-level Image Mask (parser extracts imageMaskSourceId only on <scenenode>, not <group>/<layer>) so it renders unmasked full-frame clone instead of the ring. Fix = wire imageMaskSourceId on group/layer parse (see docs/notes/salvage/group-image-mask-parser.patch) AND apply a group-level mask in the compositor (index.ts renderChildLayers; currently masks only leaf-drawables at :478).
gate_result: DONE. Group-level Image-Mask fix, SCOPED to in-group FLAT (non-3D) shape-geometry mask sources. Parser: extractImageMask on <group>/<layer>. Compositor: apply group mask ONLY when Mask Source is (a) a DESCENDANT of the owning group, (b) resolves to shape/clone/replicator geometry (not image-media), AND (c) its worldTransform is FLAT 2D (transformHas3D=false). The 3D guard is the crux: Concentric/Pinwheel/Combo_Spin ring groups carry an animated Rotation.Y swing, and the group content (clones) is projected via projectQuad while the mask rasterizes via a different perspective divide -> they mis-register, dropping all but the outermost ring (Concentric -1.03 with the mask active on 3D rings, verified vs GUI-GT). Scoping to flat sources makes it INERT on the 3D rings (baseline-green) and ACTIVE on flat group masks. FULL GUI-GT GATE: 0 regressions, 1 improvement (Center 11.89->12.35, +0.46). Watched slugs all within 0.3dB tol: Concentric 12.61->12.62, Pinwheel 13.27 (flat), Combo_Spin 11.21 (flat), Close_and_Open 10.95 (flat). Min-repro (no rotation) 25.98->37.32 dB, f10-f18 6.1->24.16. tsc clean.
